heroHeadline: Footage Shows IDF Military Dog Attacking Palestinian Man Inside West Bank Mosque
heroSubtitle: Video emerged April 5 showing an IDF military dog attacking a Palestinian man inside a mosque in the West Bank, raising fresh accountability questions over rules of engagement. Gaza Phase 2 ceasefire negotiations remain frozen — 689 Palestinians killed since the October 2025 ceasefire, food prices up 305%, and 1.6 million Gazans face acute food insecurity.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, UNRWA, Yesh Din, Human Rights Watch, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
